consent_gate.title: consent gate
consent_gate.description: The registration-time rule that no personal-data row is created before the registrant's per-purpose, versioned consent is recorded.

doctor_guest.title: doctor_guest
doctor_guest.description: The v1 self-service backend role and mirror identity granted to a net-new visitor who self-registers on the doctor portal.

enumeration_resistance.title: enumeration resistance
enumeration_resistance.description: Returning identical responses for existing vs unknown identifiers on auth surfaces, so an attacker cannot probe which accounts exist.

user_mirror.title: domain user mirror
user_mirror.description: The backend users row that projects a Zitadel identity into the domain — the UserMirror produced and reconciled by the auth feature.
